description: OGC API Features standard bounding-box filter. Coordinates appended to the URL as bbox=xmin,ymin,xmax,ymax. WGS84 is the OGC default.

type_name: OGC WFS - BBOX with Explicit CRS
description: OGC WFS 2.0 GetFeature request using a bounding box with the CRS declared as a suffix: bbox=xmin,ymin,xmax,ymax,EPSG:4326.
ArcGIS REST API FeatureServer query using an envelope geometry. Input/output CRS controlled by inSR and outSR parameters (4326 = WGS84).
coordinate_system: WGS84 (longitude / latitude) - controlled by in SR=4326
providers: CABA, MET (Met Office), NE (Natural England), TCE (Crown Estate)

description: OGC Environmental Data Retrieval (EDR) API position query. Spatial filter is a WKT POINT in the coords parameter: POINT(longitude latitude). Returns timeseries data for the nearest station as CoverageJSON.
Point-and-radius spatial search. Returns all records within a given distance (km) of a supplied WGS84 lat/lon coordinate.

The URL contains no spatial filter parameters. The full dataset is returned on every request. Spatial subsetting must be done client-side after download. Includes static downloads, catalogue listing endpoints, and WFS GetFeature calls without a BBOX.
providers: EMODnet (WFS no-bbox), CEH (location listings), EA, FSA, ICES, CEFAS
